name: generate_simple_project_harness
description: Generate harness for a simple project
expected_behavior: Builds a Project Profile before writing harness files
Chooses the smallest useful context structure
Generates AGENTS.md and minimal context routing
Extracts commands only from package.json
Does not create formal ADR without evidence
Marks uncertain business terms as UNKNOWN or low confidence
Runs Evaluate after Generate

name: evaluate_fake_adr
expected_behavior: Hard-fails formal ADR without evidence
Reports missing source/confidence
Does not treat the harness as valid

name: sync_new_route
description: Sync harness after new route added
expected_behavior: Detects new route or module change
Updates or proposes update to CONTEXT-MAP.md
Does not invent business meaning for the route
Runs Evaluate after sync

name: create_context_pack_for_auth_bug
description: Create minimal context pack for bug fix
query: create context pack for fixing login redirect bug on mobile
expected_behavior: Classifies task as bug-fix and auth/frontend affected area
Includes required context files from CONTEXT-MAP
Lists stop conditions for auth contract changes
Does not include unrelated context

name: review_harness_diff_weakened_boundary
description: Reject harness diff that loosens control systems
expected_behavior: Hard-fails weakening of working boundaries
Explains why dependency changes require approval
Suggests restoring stricter rule

name: generate_then_context_pack
description: Generate harness, then create a task-specific context pack from it
query: generate harness for ~/.hermes/skills/harness-context-engine/evals/fixtures/simple-react-project, then create a context pack for fixing a mobile login redirect bug
expected_behavior: Builds a Project Profile before generating harness files
Creates only necessary harness/context files for the simple fixture
Uses generated context routing when creating the Context Pack
Includes only task-relevant context for the login redirect bug
Does not invent a missing test command
Marks any unsupported auth or routing meaning as UNKNOWN or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW

name: sync_then_task_on_new_route
description: Sync stale harness, then prepare context for a task touching a new route
query: sync harness with ~/.hermes/skills/harness-context-engine/evals/fixtures/project-with-new-route, then create a context pack for fixing a bug on the Reports route
expected_behavior: Detects that Reports route exists in code but is missing from CONTEXT-MAP.md
Proposes or applies a CONTEXT-MAP update with source and confidence
Does not invent business meaning for Reports
Marks Reports domain meaning as UNKNOWN or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW if unsupported
Runs Evaluate after sync before producing the task Context Pack
